name: Crabmeat Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Place crabmeat over the bottom of the pre-baked pie shell.
2. Sprinkle onion and then cheese on top.
3. Beat eggs with salt and cream until combined.
4. Pour egg mixture over all ingredients in the pie dish.
5. Bake at 425°F for 5 minutes.
6. Reduce heat to 350°F and continue cooking until the quiche is firm.
7. Cover the crust loosely with foil to prevent burning if needed.
8. Slice and serve with a sweet salad, such as pineapple.
Yield: 6 to 8 servings.
